notes:
Watermark Lab 2.1.0 - New UI.

What's new:
- Clearer status while you work: an animated indicator shows a job running, a green tick when it's done, and a friendly message if something needs your attention.
- Sharper, smoother preview - including a heads-up while a high-quality preview is prepared for Word and PowerPoint files.
- Tidier action buttons and a preview zoom you can set from 10% to 800% (type a value or step it).
- Watermark existing PDFs with the same diagonal style used for PowerPoint - every page is covered and your original content shows through.

Upgrading: click Yes when prompted; your presets and recent files are kept.
